about.description: A software engineer with 5+ years of experience, spanning web application development, LLM applications, and test PMO. Outside work, I customize my local PC for generative-AI workloads and stay hands-on with the latest technology. Father of two.

experience.title: Ehime University — Faculty of Engineering, Computer Science
experience.detail: Focused on software security as a research topic.

experience.title: Kobe University Graduate School
experience.detail: Majored in entrepreneurship while researching hardware security.

experience.title: IBM — Application Developer
experience.detail: Built web applications and LLM-powered solutions across retail, manufacturing, AR/VR, mobile, and finance industries.

experience.title: Test Engineering Firm
experience.detail: Leading quality strategy and process design as a Test PMO.

projects.name: Local LLM Environment
projects.description: Built a local generative-AI environment using Ollama and GGUF models. Exploring the edge-AI frontier through MCP server development and LoRA training.

projects.name: Home Server Cluster
projects.description: Home server environment on a Raspberry Pi cluster. Built a secure network with VLAN segmentation and zero-trust architecture.

projects.name: Enterprise Web Applications
projects.description: Designed and developed web applications at IBM for retail, finance, and manufacturing industries. Built many API-driven systems with Vue.js + Flask.

projects.name: ixis
projects.description: A mobile puzzle game for iOS and Android.

projects.name: pii-masking
